prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-SANDSIFT-PARENT-PZ-AMZ Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Sand Sifting Beach Combing Kids Metal Detector Accessory - 4 Colors Description: The ASR Outdoor sifting sieves are great starter sifting tools for kids and beginners who are just getting started with metal detecting and beachcombing. It comes in 4 different vibrant colors - blue, green, yellow, and red.

These sifting pans are designed to easily sift materials out of black sand, dirt, and silt while metal detecting. They each have a diameter of 8.5” so they’ll fit on top of most standard buckets used while metal detecting or beach-combing for sand dollars and beach glass.

With built-in handles, the sifting sieves are made of durable, high-quality plastic that won’t rust so you can count on it rain or shine. Take it with you while camping or hiking near rivers, lakes, and beaches.

Each sifter features 36 holes per square inch, which will allow it to sift through medium-coarse to fine materials. Beach-combing and building sandcastles are great outdoor activities for adults and kids alike, so grab one of these stackable sieve sets before your next beach adventure. Search Terms: metal detector for adults for kids underwater pinpointer kids metal detector wand waterproof sand sifter beach toy sand castle toys for beach kit molds beach bag accessories toys tote essentials games sandproof beach toys for kids 3 to 10 Features: - 8.5” DIAMETER SIFTING SIEVE - The ASR Outdoor sand sifting classifying screen is a beach-combing essential. These sifting pans are designed to easily sift sand dollars and beach glass out of sand, silt, and dirt. The small size makes this ideal for kids too! - STACKABLE DESIGN - With built-in handles, these sifting sieves are meant to sit on top of a bucket or other classifying tool while beach-combing. It’s made of durable, high-quality plastic that won’t rust so you can count on it in unfavorable weather conditions. - 36 HOLES PER SQUARE INCH - Each sifter features 36 holes per square inch, making it a medium-coarse to fine sifting tool. This means it will sort valuable items while sifting out other unwanted materials. - ESSENTIAL BEGINNER’S BEACH-COMBING TOOL - These are great starter sifting tools for kids and beginners who are just getting started with this hobby. It comes in 4 different vibrant colors - blue, green, yellow, or red. They can also be used for building sandcastles and other beach time pretend play. - SPECIFICATIONS - Material: plastic; Colors: blue, green, yellow, or red; Holes per square inch: 36; Stackable design; Handles included; yes; Diameter: 8.5” === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 4-Pack Sand Sifting Beach Combing Sieve
